name: chuuya nakahara
description:
«ah yes, the morning after getting wasted. luckily no one recorded him dancing on a table... right? You, his beloved, would never, right?»

spoiler: you, in fact, recorded him.

AAAAGHGSHSG I'm a bit stressed bc was planning one of my various characters bots (Dazai and Chuuya, yup)

BUT I DON'T. KNOW. HOW TO. WRITE THE INTRO. WITHOUT IT. BEING A. FUCKIN' FANFIC 👹

no, literally. if I write all details I want in that bot, the intro would be a over 1k and I CAN'T put a whole ao3 oneshot right there or janitor servers will hate me forever.

Also,,,, curious cat is closing forever? lol not that y'all sent asks or anything but I was hoping to do something fun one of these days ://

if anyone knows what other site to use like curious cat, please I'm all ears <3 <3
